General.Name: Advanced Blockchain AG
General.Description: Advanced Blockchain AG operates in blockchain industry. It holds a portfolio of blockchain and Web3 solutions under the Silencio, XMAQUINA, permanent ventures, teneo, Ithil, Polkadot, Mero, Obol Network, Neon Labs, Energy Web Foundation, Arweave, Element Finance, Fractal, AO, Manta Network, zCloak Network, Talisman, Celestia, NEAR, Polymer, Myso Finance, Moxy, Maverick, Contango, Panoptic, Alluo, Pendulum, Composable Finance, Quasar, Peaq, Laconic Network, Light Protocol, TLX, Ethereum, Bitcoin, Volume Finance, EOT Labs, Filament, Mekatek, Nakamo.to, FinPro, Stela Labs, Tracebloc, SigmaDex, Apricot Finance, Sentinel dVPN, SDG Exchange, Fragnova, Forest Park, Warp Finance, and Instrumental Finance names. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Berlin, Germany.
